articles.author: Yashraj Sharma
articles.title: ‘Won’t back down’: Indian student protesters return after police crackdown - Al Jazeera
articles.description: More than 100 students injured in police action against thousands of demonstrators during march on parliament.
articles.content: New Delhi, India Blood spots on the walls, overturned barricades, shattered mirrors and sandals strewn across the road. A scarf here, broken glasses and a torn shirt there lie as remnants of the chao… [+7123 chars]

articles.author: Huzefa Baloch
articles.title: Motorola tablet with 9 JBL speakers confirmed to feature 12.1-inch display - Notebookcheck
articles.description: The Moto Pad 70 Groove is set to launch in India. Previously, the company revealed its design and confirmed that it will feature a nine-speaker JBL audio system. Now, the latest teaser reveals details about the tablet’s display and battery.
articles.content:
Motorola is set to launch the Moto Pad 70 Groove in India on July 31. Now, the tablet's official Flipkart microsite has confirmed details about its display and battery.
